message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Restarting from floorplan with FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false ==="
echo "This will rebuild ODB without multiple VDDIO bterm pins."
echo "Synthesis is already done (step 02 complete). --from Floorplan skips synthesis."
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.Floorplan \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>&1 &

NEW_PID=$!
echo "New LibreLane PID: $NEW_PID"
sleep 8
ps -p $NEW_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log
